lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੀਰੁ ਹਾਮਾ ਤਾ ਭਰੇ ਜਾ ਮੁਰਦਾਰੁ ਨ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur peer haamaa taa bhare jaa muradaar na khaae |
lines.english: Our Guru, our Spiritual Guide, stands by us, if we do not eat those carcasses.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਕੁ ਪਰਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਉਸੁ ਸੂਅਰ ਉਸੁ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hak paraaeaa naanakaa us sooar us gaae |
lines.english: : To take what rightfully belongs to another, is like a Muslim eating pork, or a Hindu eating beef.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਲੀ ਭਿਸਤਿ ਨ ਜਾਈਐ ਛੁਟੈ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: galee bhisat na jaaeeai chhuttai sach kamaae |
lines.english: By mere talk, people do not earn passage to Heaven. Salvation comes only from the practice of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰਣ ਪਾਹਿ ਹਰਾਮ ਮਹਿ ਹੋਇ ਹਲਾਲੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maaran paeh haraam meh hoe halaal na jaae |
lines.english: By adding spices to forbidden foods, they are not made acceptable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਜਿ ਨਿਵਾਜਾ ਵਖਤ ਪੰਜਿ ਪੰਜਾ ਪੰਜੇ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: panj nivaajaa vakhat panj panjaa panje naau |
lines.english: There are five prayers and five times of day for prayer; the five have five names.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗਲੀ ਕੂੜੀਈ ਕੂੜੋ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak galee koorreeee koorro palai paae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, from false talk, only falsehood is obtained. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਉਥੀ ਨੀਅਤਿ ਰਾਸਿ ਮਨੁ ਪੰਜਵੀ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: chauthee neeat raas man panjavee sifat sanaae |
lines.english: Let the fourth be good will to all, and the fifth the praise of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਲਾ ਸਚੁ ਹਲਾਲ ਦੁਇ ਤੀਜਾ ਖੈਰ ਖੁਦਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: pahilaa sach halaal due teejaa khair khudaae |
lines.english: Let the first be truthfulness, the second honest living, and the third charity in the Name of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੇਤੇ ਕੂੜਿਆਰ ਕੂੜੈ ਕੂੜੀ ਪਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak jete koorriaar koorrai koorree paae |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the false obtain falsehood, and only falsehood. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣੀ ਕਲਮਾ ਆਖਿ ਕੈ ਤਾ ਮੁਸਲਮਾਣੁ ਸਦਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: karanee kalamaa aakh kai taa musalamaan sadaae |
lines.english: Repeat the prayer of good deeds, and then, you may call yourself a Muslim.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਰਤਨ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਵਣਜਦੇ ਇਕਿ ਕਚੈ ਦੇ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eik ratan padaarath vanajade ik kachai de vaapaaraa |
lines.english: Some trade in priceless jewels, while others deal in mere glass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਤੁਠੈ ਪਾਈਅਨਿ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਰਤਨ ਭੰਡਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: satigur tutthai paaeean andar ratan bhanddaaraa |
lines.english: When the True Guru is pleased, we find the treasure of the jewel, deep within the self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਲਧਿਆ ਅੰਧੇ ਭਉਕਿ ਮੁਏ ਕੂੜਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: vin gur kinai na ladhiaa andhe bhauk mue koorriaaraa |
lines.english: Without the Guru, no one has found this treasure. The blind and the false have died in their endless wanderings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਦੂਜੈ ਪਚਿ ਮੁਏ ਨਾ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh doojai pach mue naa boojheh veechaaraa |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs putrefy and die in duality. They do not understand contemplative meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਸੁ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਕਿਸੁ ਅਗੈ ਕਰਹਿ ਪੁਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eikas baajhahu doojaa ko nahee kis agai kareh pukaaraa |
lines.english: Without the One Lord, there is no other at all. Unto whom should they complain?

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਨਿਰਧਨ ਸਦਾ ਭਉਕਦੇ ਇਕਨਾ ਭਰੇ ਤੁਜਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eik niradhan sadaa bhaukade ikanaa bhare tujaaraa |
lines.english: Some are destitute, and wander around endlessly, while others have storehouses of wealth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਹੋਰੁ ਧਨੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਹੋਰੁ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਛਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: vin naavai hor dhan naahee hor bikhiaa sabh chhaaraa |
lines.english: Without God's Name, there is no other wealth. Everything else is just poison and ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰੇ ਆਪਿ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਸਵਾਰਣਹਾਰਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak aap karaae kare aap hukam savaaranahaaraa |7|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord Himself acts, and causes others to act; by the Hukam of His Command, we are embellished and exalted. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਸਲਮਾਣੁ ਕਹਾਵਣੁ ਮੁਸਕਲੁ ਜਾ ਹੋਇ ਤਾ ਮੁਸਲਮਾਣੁ ਕਹਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: musalamaan kahaavan musakal jaa hoe taa musalamaan kahaavai |
lines.english: It is difficult to be called a Muslim; if one is truly a Muslim, then he may be called one.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਲਿ ਅਉਲਿ ਦੀਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਿਠਾ ਮਸਕਲ ਮਾਨਾ ਮਾਲੁ ਮੁਸਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: aval aaul deen kar mitthaa masakal maanaa maal musaavai |
lines.english: First, let him savor the religion of the Prophet as sweet; then, let his pride of his possessions be scraped away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਮੁਸਲਿਮੁ ਦੀਨ ਮੁਹਾਣੈ ਮਰਣ ਜੀਵਣ ਕਾ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: hoe musalim deen muhaanai maran jeevan kaa bharam chukaavai |
lines.english: Becoming a true Muslim, a disciple of the faith of Mohammed, let him put aside the delusion of death and life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਬ ਜੀਆ ਮਿਹਰੰਮਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਤ ਮੁਸਲਮਾਣੁ ਕਹਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tau naanak sarab jeea miharamat hoe ta musalamaan kahaavai |1|
lines.english: And when, O Nanak, he is merciful to all beings, only then shall he be called a Muslim. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਬ ਕੀ ਰਜਾਇ ਮੰਨੇ ਸਿਰ ਉਪਰਿ ਕਰਤਾ ਮੰਨੇ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: rab kee rajaae mane sir upar karataa mane aap gavaavai |
lines.english: As he submits to God's Will, and surrenders to the Creator, he is rid of selfishness and conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਹਰਿ ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਝੂਠੁ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਤਜਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ਚੁਕਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: parahar kaam krodh jhootth nindaa taj maaeaa ahankaar chukaavai |
lines.english: Renounce sexual desire, anger, falsehood and slander; forsake Maya and eliminate egotistical pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਕਾਮੁ ਕਾਮਿਨੀ ਮੋਹੁ ਤਜੈ ਤਾ ਅੰਜਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: taj kaam kaaminee mohu tajai taa anjan maeh niranjan paavai |
lines.english: Renounce sexual desire and promiscuity, and give up emotional attachment. Only then shall you obtain the Immaculate Lord amidst the darkness of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਮਾਨੁ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਸੁਤ ਦਾਰਾ ਤਜਿ ਪਿਆਸ ਆਸ ਰਾਮ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: taj maan abhimaan preet sut daaraa taj piaas aas raam liv laavai |
lines.english: Renounce selfishness, conceit and arrogant pride, and your love for your children and spouse. Abandon your thirsty hopes and desires, and embrace love for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਚਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਾਚ ਸਬਦਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak saachaa man vasai saach sabad har naam samaavai |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the True One shall come to dwell in your mind. Through the True Word of the Shabad, you shall be absorbed in the Name of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜੇ ਰਯਤਿ ਸਿਕਦਾਰ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਰਹਸੀਓ ॥
lines.translit: raaje rayat sikadaar koe na rahaseeo |
lines.english: Neither the kings, nor their subjects, nor the leaders shall remain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਟ ਪਟਣ ਬਾਜਾਰ ਹੁਕਮੀ ਢਹਸੀਓ ॥
lines.translit: hatt pattan baajaar hukamee dtahaseeo |
lines.english: The shops, the cities and the streets shall eventually disintegrate, by the Hukam of the Lord's Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਬਿ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰ ਰੀਤੇ ਇਕਿ ਖਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: darab bhare bhanddaar reete ik khane |
lines.english: The treasure-houses, filled with wealth, shall be emptied out in an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਕੇ ਬੰਕ ਦੁਆਰ ਮੂਰਖੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਆਪਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: pake bank duaar moorakh jaanai aapane |
lines.english: Those solid and beautiful mansions-the fools think that they belong to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਜੀ ਰਥ ਤੁਖਾਰ ਹਾਥੀ ਪਾਖਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: taajee rath tukhaar haathee paakhare |
lines.english: The horses, chariots, camels and elephants, with all their decorations;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਸਿਨਾਖਤੁ ਕੁਦਰਤੀ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak sach daataar sinaakhat kudaratee |8|
lines.english: O Nanak, the True One is the Giver of all; He is revealed through His All-powerful Creative Nature. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੰਬੂ ਪਲੰਘ ਨਿਵਾਰ ਸਰਾਇਚੇ ਲਾਲਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: tanboo palangh nivaar saraaeiche laalatee |
lines.english: Oh, where are those things, which they believe to be their own?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਗ ਮਿਲਖ ਘਰ ਬਾਰ ਕਿਥੈ ਸਿ ਆਪਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: baag milakh ghar baar kithai si aapane |
lines.english: the gardens, lands, houses, tents, soft beds and satin pavilions -

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦੀਆ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਧੇਣਵਾ ਸੁੰਮ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਦੁਧੁ ਘੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: nadeea hoveh dhenavaa sunm hoveh dudh gheeo |
lines.english: If the rivers became cows, giving milk, and the spring water became milk and ghee;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲੀ ਧਰਤੀ ਸਕਰ ਹੋਵੈ ਖੁਸੀ ਕਰੇ ਨਿਤ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: sagalee dharatee sakar hovai khusee kare nit jeeo |
lines.english: If all the earth became sugar, to continually excite the mind;
